description: Golden ICSR/CIOMS narratives — reviewed, approved, production-quality outputs that CI holds the line behind (structural + grounding regression).

cases.artifact: A 54-year-old female patient experienced headache approximately 2 days after starting Cardizem 120 mg administered by the oral route. The adverse event was assessed as non-serious, and the patient recovered following discontinuation. The reporter, located in the United States, considered the reaction possibly related to the suspect drug on the basis of the temporal association and a positive dechallenge. No rechallenge was performed. This narrative is prepared for medical review prior to any expedited submission decision; no reporting determination has been finalized.
